title: Shaheed Diwas 2026: PM Modi, Rahul Gandhi, Kejriwal & other politicians pay tribute to Bhagat Singh, Sukhdev, Rajguru
description: Tributes poured in on Shaheed Diwas for Bhagat Singh, Sukhdev, and Rajguru. Leaders emphasised their sacrifices and courage, with PM Modi highlighting their lasting impact on India's freedom struggle and inspiring future generations.
